{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Underlord's Remnant
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|An [[Underlord's Remnant]] is a powerful entity that can be released from a corpse.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c6">''Skysworn'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Lifeforms]]
